errorMessages.invalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a valid song URL.
errorMessages.invalidVideoData: Invalid video data. Please check the URL and try again.
errorMessages.apiError: API Error. Please try again later.

fuel.title: Fuel Type
fuel.description: Select the type of fuel used by the vehicle. Litres or Gallons. * Changes will be saved.

map.title: Map
map.description: Select the format in which you want to see the map.

carhuds.description: On the right you can edit carhud's colour palettes and find your own colour.

status.description: On the right you can edit hud's colour palettes and find your own colour.

color.title: Select Colors
color.description: Select the colors for the right corner elements. You can choose a different colour for each icon and text.

old.title: Old
old.description: Contains the old-looking information in a row.

boxed_dynamic.title: Boxed Dynamic
boxed_dynamic.description: The box shape has a dynamic appearance. The colours can change according to the morning or evening cycle.

modern.title: Modern
modern.description: It is boxed and has the newest look. Definitely recommended.

simple.title: Simple
simple.description: It is a simple design that does not contain any boxes. It is very useful for those who like simplicity.

mapRadius.title: Map softness
mapRadius.description: You can select the edge softness of the square map here.

performance.title: Performance Mode
performance.description: You can select the performance mode here. It will change the performance of the hud. It is recommended to use this mode if you have a low-end PC.

theme_data.title: Import/Export Theme
theme_data.description: You can export your current theme or import a new theme

speed.title: Speed type
speed.description: Select the speed type you want to see in Carhud.
